title: Immersive Animals
description: Capture chickens with bare hands, house them in craftable coops, and harvest eggs & feathers on timers. Vanilla-friendly with full config support
body:

## **Immersive Animals**

Enhances vanilla creatures with new, lore-friendly interactions. This mod is designed to feel like a natural extension of the base game—no fantasy creatures, just better vanilla.

**🐔 Current Features: Chickens**
- Capture Chickens
- Right-click a chicken with an empty hand to capture it
- The chicken becomes a portable Captured Chicken item
- Place it anywhere or put it in a coop!

**Chicken Coops**
- Craftable wooden coops with iron bars
- Place a captured chicken inside to start production
- Chickens are visible inside the coop as real entities

**Collect Resources**
- 🥚 Eggs - Collect on a configurable timer
- 🪶 Feathers - Use shears on the coop to collect feathers
- All timers are fully configurable via ModMenu

**⚙️ Configuration**
Requires Cloth Config and ModMenu for in-game settings:

- Egg collection cooldown
- Feather collection cooldown
- Feather drop amount (min/max)

**🔮 Coming Soon**
More vanilla animals will receive immersive improvements:
- Cows
- Sheep
- Pigs
- And more!

**📋 Requirements**
- Minecraft 1.21.4
- Fabric Loader 0.16.0+
- Fabric API
- Cloth Config (optional, for settings)
- ModMenu (optional, for settings UI)
